response.justification: Strong software engineer with 19 years of full-stack experience and proven product-building ability, but critically lacks demonstrated AI/ML expertise and advanced training in AI—core requirements for a principal engineer focused on AI strategy. Recent work on agentic infrastructure suggests potential interest but insufficient depth for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: 19 years of diverse, proven engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure—exceeds experience requirements
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain production platforms (GISCollective used by real organizations) and strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Track record of learning new languages and domains; entrepreneurial experience founding GISCollective shows initiative and strategic thinking
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML or recognized products/platforms built with AI—a core requirement for AI strategy principal engineer role
No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; recent AI-adjacent work (MCP, agentic infrastructure) appears to be tooling/infrastructure rather than deep AI expertise
Career focused on full-stack application development rather than specialized AI strategy, machine learning model development, or large-scale AI system architecture
